design_philosophy: Mobile-first PWA focusing on premium trust and deep contrast. Utilizing deep obsidian backgrounds with warm amber accents to evoke a high-end, reliable consultation service in the Indian market. Heavy use of glassmorphism for overlays and native-feeling gesture interactions. Rejects cheap/generic consultation visuals in favor of a private concierge feel.

spacing_and_layout.mobile_container: max-w-md mx-auto w-full min-h-screen bg-[#0A0D14] relative overflow-hidden shadow-2xl shadow-black/50 border-x border-white/5
spacing_and_layout.admin_container: w-full min-h-screen bg-[#0A0D14] grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-[250px_1fr]

components.bottom_sheet: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 w-full max-w-md mx-auto bg-[#151923] rounded-t-3xl border-t border-white/10 p-6 shadow-[0_-12px_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.6)] z-50
components.glass_header: sticky top-0 z-40 w-full backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0D14]/80 px-6 py-4 flex justify-between items-center border-b border-white/5
components.card: bg-[#151923] rounded-2xl border border-white/5 p-5 flex flex-col gap-3 relative overflow-hidden
components.provider_card: flex gap-4 p-4 bg-[#151923] rounded-2xl border border-white/5 items-center hover:bg-[#1A1F2B] transition-colors
components.primary_button: w-full bg-[#F59E0B] hover:bg-[#D97706] text-black font-semibold py-4 rounded-xl flex justify-center items-center transition-transform active:scale-[0.98] shadow-[0_4px_14px_rgba(245,158,11,0.2)]
components.secondary_button: w-full bg-[#272E3F] hover:bg-[#333C52] text-white font-medium py-4 rounded-xl flex justify-center items-center transition-transform active:scale-[0.98]
components.danger_button: w-full bg-[#EF4444]/10 hover:bg-[#EF4444]/20 text-[#EF4444] border border-[#EF4444]/30 font-medium py-4 rounded-xl flex justify-center items-center transition-all
components.video_call_overlay: absolute bottom-8 left-6 right-6 backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#0A0D14]/70 border border-white/10 rounded-3xl p-6 flex flex-col gap-4 shadow-2xl
components.status_badge_online: bg-[#10B981]/10 text-[#10B981] text-xs font-semibold px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full border border-[#10B981]/20 flex items-center gap-1.5 shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(16,185,129,0.1)]
components.status_badge_offline: bg-white/5 text-[#94A3B8] text-xs font-medium px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full border border-white/10 flex items-center gap-1.5
components.input_field: w-full bg-[#0A0D14] border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white focus:outline-none focus:border-[#F59E0B] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#F59E0B]/50 transition-all
components.admin_th: px-4 py-3 bg-[#151923] font-medium text-white border-b border-white/10

backgrounds.description: Premium dark abstract background for Login, Wallet, and Hero sections

payment.description: Abstract QR Code visual for Wallet/UPI Top-up screen

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme colors provided. DO NOT use generic Vercel/Stripe light themes, purple/teal gradients, or purely white backgrounds.

The application has two distinct layouts: A mobile-first PWA for users/providers (wrap all mobile routes in a 'max-w-md mx-auto' container to simulate an app on desktop monitors) and a desktop web Admin Panel (full width grid layout).
For the mobile PWA, use 'fixed bottom-0' for navigation and critical CTAs (like 'Start Video Call' or 'I Paid') to ensure thumb-friendly ergonomics.
For typography, import 'Outfit' for headings and 'Plus Jakarta Sans' for body text from Google Fonts via CSS or Next.js fonts. Do NOT use Inter or Roboto.
Use the specific 'glass_header', 'bottom_sheet', and 'video_call_overlay' component guidelines to create depth and a premium concierge feel.
When displaying currency, format strictly as '₹XX/min' or '₹XXXX' using the Indian Rupee symbol.
Ensure the video call screen feels immersive by taking up the full viewport height within the mobile container, overlaying the live wallet deduction and end call buttons with glassmorphism.
Use standard Shadcn UI components for the Admin Panel but customize their borders and backgrounds to match the #0A0D14 base dark theme.
Always add 'data-testid' to interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, list items).
